title: Phase 3 shell state API and audit WebSocket smoke
description: Agent-sim calls GET /api/shell/state (HTTP) and connects to /api/shell/audit/ws (WebSocket), exercising the same shell state and audit stream paths used by test/phase3probe. Suitable for CI smoke: the test harness provides local HTTP/WS servers mimicking the shell API.

expected_outcomes.description: shell state response contains agent list
